title: Brandads 14 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: A highly detailed, photorealistic product render of the FIFA 2026 World Cup trophy, featuring the iconic golden silhouette with modern geometric updates and subtle "2026" engraving. Studio three-point lighting with soft directional highlights, emphasizing metallic gold surfaces paired with minimal high-fashion campaign mood. Seamless off-white background (#F5F5F0), clean and uncluttered, grounded with a soft, natural drop shadow.
